sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine / பெயர்ச்சொல் (பெண்பால்)
the natural disposition, temper, character; movement or agitation of soul, impulse, desire, any violent emotion.

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G3713; properly desire (as a reaching forth or excitement of the mind), that is, (by analogy) violent passion (ire, or [justifiable] abhorrence); by implication punishment: - anger, indignation, vengeance, wrath.
